title: Inspect the GitHub repo context for /Users/masayuki/.claude (origin cursorvers/claude-config). Determine the best existing GitHub recording target for a local production verification result about the openai-codex Claude plugin. Look for any open PR on current branch, recent issues/PRs related to cod...
summary_text: 1) `issue` 2) `create new issue in cursorvers/claude-config` (no existing suitable target found) - No open PRs were found for `cursorvers/claude-config` (recent PRs are closed/merged and none are codex-plugin specific). - Searches for open PR/issue matches like `codex plugin`, `openai-codex`, `Claude plugin`, and `openai` returned no active thread specifically tracking the openai-codex Claude plugin verification. - Recent plugin-adjacent threads are mostly orchestration/general integration (for example #84, #35), and do not appear to be the canonical place for a production verification record. - Creating a dedicated issue gives the cleanest, auditable, and non-destructive place to attach a concise local production verification result tied to the plugin.
